body.after: ga al’ummar Musulmi (Ummah). Gudummawarka ta son rai tana taimaka mana wajen kula da sabobinmu, ƙara sabbin fasali, da yi wa Musulmi hidima a duniya.

quote.text: “Duk wanda ya shiryar da wani zuwa alheri, zai samu lada kamar wanda ya aikata shi.”

supporter.name: Mai Tallafawa
supporter.description: Ka taimaka wajen kula da dandamali da bunƙasa shi
benefits: A saka sunanka a jerin masu tallafawa
Taimakawa a ci gaba da bayar da kyauta ga kowa

communityFriend.name: Abokin Al’umma
benefits: Taimaka mana faɗaɗa zuwa duniya baki ɗaya

bottom.optionalTitle: Wannan shiri na son rai ne 100%
bottom.optionalBody: Manhajar za ta kasance kyauta ga Ummah koyaushe. Babu wani fasali da aka kulle saboda gudummawa. Tallafinka yana taimaka mana ne kawai mu bunƙasa da hidimar Musulmi da yawa.
bottom.footerNote: Dukkan gudummawa na son rai ne, kuma suna taimakawa wajen kula da sabobi, haɓaka sabbin fasali, da faɗaɗa hidimarmu ga Musulmi a duniya.
